rulings.Case Title: ALEX LELIEVRE et al VS. SCOTT HUNTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion To Modify Order On Perliminary Injunction;
rulings.Rulings: GRANT BOTH MOTIONS IN PART--(1)PLAINTIFF CAN USE THE EASEMENT FOR ACCESS TO PARKING ON CONCRETE PAD AND FOOT TRAFFIC TO THE CONCRETE PAD; (2)UTILITY WORKERS CAN WALK ON THE EASEMENT TO PERFORM WORK; (3)UTILITY WORKERS CAN DRIVE ON THE EASEMENT AND PARK ON THE CONCRETE PAD; AND (4)UTILITY WORKERS AND PLAINTIFF CANNOT PARK ON THE EASEMENT AND/OR BLOCK EASEMENT. PRIVACY ISSUE TO BE RAISED BEFORE PRESIDING JUDGE AND DEFT TO COMPLY WITH CCP 527.6. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: ALEX LELIEVRE et al VS. SCOTT HUNTER et al

PRIVACY ISSUE TO BE RAISED BEFORE PRESIDING JUDGE AND DEFT TO COMPLY WITH CCP 527.6. (PB)
